title: Social media bans on teens risk strengthening Big Tech's grip on the sector, Bluesky exec warns
summary_full: "We're living in a world where it's almost impossible for smaller entrants to come in and build healthier spaces," Bluesky's COO, Rose Wang, told CNBC.
summary_public: "We're living in a world where it's almost impossible for smaller entrants to come in and build healthier spaces," Bluesky's COO, Rose Wang, told CNBC.
